feed.title: minnesotabankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Minnesota Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Minnesota bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Minnesota exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: The 341 Meeting of Creditors in Minnesota
entry.summary: What to expect at the 341 meeting of creditors in Minnesota bankruptcy. How to prepare, common questions, what to bring, and tips for success.

entry.title: The Automatic Stay in Minnesota Bankruptcy
entry.summary: Learn how the automatic stay protects Minnesota residents when filing bankruptcy. What stops immediately, what does not, stay violations, and.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in Minnesota
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in Minnesota. Levies, setoff rights, protecting deposits, and what to do before filing in D. Minn..

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13 in Minnesota?
entry.summary: How to buy a car during Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Minnesota. Court motions, trustee approval, interest rates, and budget requirements.

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Minnesota
entry.summary: When and how you can buy a home after filing bankruptcy in Minnesota. Waiting periods for FHA, VA, and conventional loans, credit rebuilding, and.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy in Minnesota
entry.summary: What happens to your car lease in Minnesota bankruptcy. Assume or reject, 60-day deadline, early termination fees, and practical options.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy Eligibility in Minnesota
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility requirements in Minnesota. Debt limits, regular income, plan length, and requirements for filing in D. Minn..

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in Minnesota
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 payment amounts are calculated in Minnesota. Disposable income, plan length, missed payments, and modification options in D. Minn..

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Minnesota -- Payment Plans, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Minnesota. Payment plan basics, timeline, 3-5 year commitment, and what to expect during the repayment process.
